problems_encountered.description: Tool performs DESTRUCTIVE operation - permanently uninstalls app installation from production environment. Executing would delete actual app installation a-v2tmw9 and all associated data/configuration.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed - destructive operation would delete production data
execution_notes: This tool permanently uninstalls app installations. Requires installationId parameter and confirmation flag. Prerequisites met (app installation a-v2tmw9 exists), but executing would permanently delete the app installation from production environment, removing all associated configurations, files, and potentially user data. This destructive operation should be avoided during evaluation.
